title: LLMOps · Cost, latency, caching, and model routing
focus: Reduce inference cost with routing and caching while preserving measurable quality.

items.label: Design small-to-large model routing with quality gates
Compare semantic cache, exact cache, prompt cache, and retrieval cache
Trim context with retrieval filters, compression, reranking, and summaries

interviewQuestions: An LLM feature is over budget. What do you measure and change first?
How do you route traffic across models without silently hurting answer quality?
